claudeMd:
# Adviser Harness — Organization Doctrine (managed)

This org uses the Adviser Group Claude Code harness (plugin: harness@adviser-group). Drive non-trivial work through the harness pipeline.

Harness skills, agents, protocols, and rules live in the installed plugin directory. To read a protocol/rule, first run `echo $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`, then read `$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/protocols/<file>.md` or `$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rules/<file>.md`.

## Entry
Start every task via /harness:intake (classify + route), which drives /harness:pipeline (phases).

## Iron Laws (hooks enforce these — do not bypass)
1. No acceptance criterion ships without a failing-then-passing test for it plus >=70% mutation score on changed lines.
2. No completion claims without fresh verification evidence — re-run before claiming done.
3. The orchestrator never writes source code — it coordinates agents.
4. Repo HEAD stays on main — all HEAD-mutating git runs via worktree delegation.
5. No phase skipped, no gate bypassed, no skill omitted.
6. Findings surfaced in review are fixed in this pipeline — no follow-ups, no user questions.
7. Every pipeline produces an observation.

## Session start (automatic)
Check for an in-progress pipeline and resume it; if a merged PR is pending deploy, continue the deploy.

## Pipeline phase order
Plan -> Plan Validation -> Build (code-review as final step) -> Security Review -> Final Gate (Verify + Test + Accept + Patch Critique) -> Ship -> Deploy -> Reflect.

hooks.command: case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in Darwin|Linux|*BSD*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "${OSTYPE:-}" in msys*|cygwin*|win32) exit 0;; esac; command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; mkdir -p "$C/logs" 2>/dev/null; t="${GITHUB_TOKEN:-${GH_TOKEN:-}}"; if [ -z "$t" ] && command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then t="$(gh auth token 2>/dev/null)"; fi; [ -n "$t" ] && export GITHUB_TOKEN="$t"; export CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_KEEP_MARKETPLACE_ON_FAILURE=1; ( claude plugin marketplace list 2>/dev/null | grep -q adviser-group || claude plugin marketplace add Adviser-Group/.claude; if claude plugin list 2>/dev/null | grep -q adviser-group; then : > "$C/.adviser-harness-installed"; claude plugin marketplace update adviser-group; else claude plugin install harness@adviser-group && : > "$C/.adviser-harness-installed"; fi ) >> "$C/logs/harness-bootstrap.log" 2>&1 & exit 0

[ "${ADVISER_HARNESS_OPT_OUT:-}" = "1" ] && exit 0; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in Darwin|Linux|*BSD*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "${OSTYPE:-}" in msys*|cygwin*|win32) exit 0;; esac; C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; [ -f "$C/.adviser-harness-installed" ] && exit 0; if [ -f "$C/plugins/known_marketplaces.json" ] && grep -q adviser-group "$C/plugins/known_marketplaces.json" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Adviser harness not detected. It should auto-install on your NEXT Claude Code restart. If not: run gh auth login (or export GITHUB_TOKEN) then restart; or install manually: claude plugin marketplace add Adviser-Group/.claude && claude plugin install harness@adviser-group then restart. One-off bypass: export ADVISER_HARNESS_OPT_OUT=1 then restart. Help #eng-harness."}}'; exit 0
